title: Mission Control Access Switches
summary: Commission R1-SW01 through R1-SW03, validate classroom workstation paths, and document access switch baselines.
action: Wipe and recommission R1-SW01, then finish validation notes.

title: Rocket’s Forge Proxmox Core
summary: Prepare R2-PVE01, R2-PVE02, and R2-PVE03 as the virtualization foundation for teaching services.
action: Validate RAM, storage, iDRAC access, and first service deployment.

title: Rocket’s Forge Storage and Image Repository
summary: Use Dell PowerEdge R930 class hardware for ISO storage, VM templates, restore staging, and Proxmox backups.
action: Inventory drives, select TrueNAS or Linux storage model, then connect to Proxmox.

title: Western Pennsylvania Cyber Defense Command
summary: Operate the HP c3000 and BL460c Gen9 blade environment as the cyber range compute platform.
action: Resolve management access and create initial VM templates.

title: Second R930 Cyber Defense Storage Host
summary: Integrate the second R930 as cyber range storage while documenting power, cooling, and controlled startup policies.
action: Complete power draw review and rack placement decision.

title: Patch Bay Alpha Security Edge Staging Bay
summary: Rack one Fortinet firewall, one Palo Alto firewall, and one Cisco 2900 Series router as a non-production security-edge staging bay.
action: Rack equipment, cable management, label, photograph, and document.

title: ACE Service Desk
summary: Deploy GLPI as the student-facing help desk and simulated support workflow platform.
action: Build R2-HDSK01 and define first ticket categories.

title: SOTE Command Wall
summary: Display service status, cyber range activity, project board, ACE tickets, rack health, maps, and student missions.
action: Define R1-DISP01 kiosk workflow and dashboard rotation.

title: Ask SOTEE Kiosk
summary: Provide an interactive student and visitor assistant for SOTE questions, missions, documentation lookup, and next steps.
action: Create approved FAQ and safe response boundaries.

title: SOTE Mission Badges
summary: Create collectible digital and printable badges tied to hands-on mission completion.
action: Connect badge criteria to mission queue and student roles.

title: Rocket’s Parts Locker
summary: Organize spare parts, rails, cables, adapters, transceivers, and repair inventory into a student-managed locker system.
action: Create inventory bins, labels, and intake checklist.
